     2→import path from 'node:path'
     3→import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
     4→
     5→import {
     6→  compileCodeSplitReferenceRoute,
     7→  compileCodeSplitVirtualRoute,
     8→} from '../src/core/code-splitter/compilers'
     9→import { createIdentifier } from '../src/core/code-splitter/path-ids'
    10→import { defaultCodeSplitGroupings } from '../src/core/constants'
    11→import { frameworks } from './constants'
    12→import type { CodeSplitGroupings } from '../src/core/constants'
    13→
    14→function getFrameworkDir(framework: string) {
    15→  const files = path.resolve(
    16→    __dirname,
    17→    `./code-splitter/test-files/${framework}`,
    18→  )
    19→  const snapshots = path.resolve(
    20→    __dirname,
    21→    `./code-splitter/snapshots/${framework}`,
    22→  )
    23→  return { files, snapshots }
    24→}
    25→
    26→const testGroups: Array<{ name: string; groupings: CodeSplitGroupings }> = [
    27→  {
    28→    name: '1-default',
    29→    groupings: defaultCodeSplitGroupings,
    30→  },
    31→  {
    32→    name: '2-components-combined-loader-separate',
    33→    groupings: [
    34→      ['loader'],
    35→      ['component', 'pendingComponent', 'errorComponent', 'notFoundComponent'],
    36→    ],
    37→  },
    38→  {
    39→    name: '3-all-combined-errorComponent-separate',
    40→    groupings: [
    41→      ['loader', 'component', 'pendingComponent', 'notFoundComponent'],
    42→      ['errorComponent'],
    43→    ],
    44→  },
    45→]
    46→
    47→describe('code-splitter works', () => {
    48→  describe.each(frameworks)('FRAMEWORK=%s', (framework) => {
    49→    describe.each(testGroups)(
    50→      'SPLIT_GROUP=$name',
    51→      async ({ groupings: grouping, name: groupName }) => {
    52→        const dirs = getFrameworkDir(framework)
    53→        const filenames = await readdir(dirs.files)
    54→
    55→        it.each(filenames)(
    56→          `should compile "reference" for "%s"`,
    57→          async (filename) => {
    58→            const file = await readFile(path.join(dirs.files, filename))
    59→            const code = file.toString()
    60→
    61→            const compileResult = compileCodeSplitReferenceRoute({
    62→              code,
    63→              filename,
    64→              id: filename,
    65→              addHmr: false,
    66→              codeSplitGroupings: grouping,
    67→              targetFramework: framework,
    68→            })
    69→
    70→            await expect(compileResult.code).toMatchFileSnapshot(
    71→              path.join(dirs.snapshots, groupName, filename),
    72→            )
    73→          },
    74→        )
    75→
    76→        it.each(filenames)(
    77→          `should compile "virtual" for "%s"`,
    78→          async (filename) => {
    79→            const file = await readFile(path.join(dirs.files, filename))
    80→            const code = file.toString()
    81→
    82→            for (const targets of grouping) {
    83→              const ident = createIdentifier(targets)
    84→
    85→              const splitResult = compileCodeSplitVirtualRoute({
    86→                code,
    87→                filename: `${filename}?${ident}`,
    88→                splitTargets: targets,
    89→              })
    90→
    91→              const snapshotFilename = path.join(
    92→                dirs.snapshots,
    93→                groupName,
    94→                `${filename.replace('.tsx', '')}@${ident}.tsx`,
    95→              )
    96→              await expect(splitResult.code).toMatchFileSnapshot(
    97→                snapshotFilename,
    98→              )
    99→            }
   100→          },
   101→        )
   102→      },
   103→    )
   104→  })
